message:
type: SURVEY
files: src/click/core.py,src/click/types.py
note: Feature: dynamic default resolution for options via default={'--opt': {val: default}} dict mapping. Need to touch: Option.__init__ (validate dynamic default dict, store flag), Option.get_help_record (show '(dynamic)' when show_default and default is dynamic dict), Option.get_default (skip resolving dict-based default normally / return None until resolved), Command.main() (add second-pass resolution loop after parse_args to resolve dynamic defaults using ctx.params source == DEFAULT check). Also possibly Parameter.get_default in core.py. Please share what you're touching so we can find overlap.

type: SURVEY
files: src/click/core.py,src/click/types.py
note: Adding batch_size param to Option (multiple=True) for chunked processing. Will touch: Option.__init__ (new batch_size kwarg + validation), Option.to_info_dict (add batch_size key), Parameter.type_cast_value (batching/chunking logic for multiple values). Validation: batch_size requires multiple=True, negative batch_size raises ValueError.

type: DRAFT
files: src/click/core.py
region: Option.__init__ signature + body
note: Overlap confirmed: both of us edit Option.__init__. My change: add new kwarg 'batch_size: int | None = None' to the signature (placed after 'multiple: bool = False, count: bool = False,' -> so 'multiple: bool = False, count: bool = False, batch_size: int | None = None,'), store 'self.batch_size = batch_size' right after 'self.count = count' block, and add validation inside the existing 'if __debug__:' block: 'if self.batch_size is not None: if not self.multiple: raise TypeError("batch_size is only permitted when multiple=True."); if self.batch_size < 0: raise ValueError("batch_size must be a non-negative integer.")'. Can you paste your exact intended diff/lines for __init__ (new kwarg(s), where stored, where validated) so we can merge into one final ordering of the signature and body?

type: AGREE
files: src/click/core.py
region: Option.__init__ signature + body
code: (same as previous DRAFT — confirmed identical)
note: Confirmed identical to my draft, writing verbatim now. No other overlapping constructs identified (I'll add get_help_record/get_default changes to Option, and Command.main second-pass resolution — none of which you touch).

type: DONE
files: src/click/core.py,src/click/types.py
note: Implemented batch_size feature: Option.__init__ merged block written verbatim as agreed, plus my own additions (to_info_dict batch_size key, new Option.type_cast_value override for chunking). No changes needed in types.py after all. Finalizing patch.txt now.

type: DONE
files: src/click/core.py
note: Finished dynamic-default feature: merged Option.__init__ written verbatim as agreed; added Option.get_default override (returns None for dict defaults so type casting doesn't choke), get_help_extra now shows [default: (dynamic)] for dict defaults, and Command._resolve_dynamic_defaults + hook in main() before invoke() for second-pass resolution. Ran full test suite - 680 passed. Let me know if you still need anything from me before I write patch.txt.
